title: Market Brief — Monday, May 25, 2026
summary: Compute is tight across every GPU class. Util-avail stands at just 15% for A100 (severe shortage), 24% for H100 (scarce), 28% for H200, and 17% for B200 (near-severe). H100 spot jumped 12.9% day-over-day to $2.64/hr, the biggest single-day move in the stack, while B200 climbed 5.3% to $5.13/hr. H200 volatility at 196.5% annualized signals a market still hunting for equilibrium.
paragraphs: Compute is tight across every GPU class. Util-avail stands at just 15% for A100 (severe shortage), 24% for H100 (scarce), 28% for H200, and 17% for B200 (near-severe). H100 spot jumped 12.9% day-over-day to $2.64/hr, the biggest single-day move in the stack, while B200 climbed 5.3% to $5.13/hr. H200 volatility at 196.5% annualized signals a market still hunting for equilibrium.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), running Llama 70B on H100 costs roughly $9.66/M tokens, meaning any provider pricing output at $3/M or below is hemorrhaging cash. DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.45/M output is selling at an estimated loss of $9.21/M tokens. Meta Llama 3.3 70B at $0.32/M output loses roughly $9.34/M. Grades: OpenAI Strong, Anthropic Neutral, Google Neutral, DeepSeek Burning Cash.

B200 is undervalued: tightest next-gen supply at 17% util-avail, 58% of advertised offerings still free, and the only GPU class where medium-tier inference margins turn positive. o3 Pro at $80/M output is overvalued when Claude Opus 4.6 matches the frontier tier at $25/M. Trade: lock B200 capacity now, rotate premium inference workloads off H100.
bullets: 15% util-avail on A100 marks severe shortage, the tightest in the current stack.
17% util-avail on B200 signals near-severe scarcity despite 58% of advertised offerings sitting free.
$3.75/M TCO-adjusted cost on B200 is 51% cheaper than H200 for Llama 70B inference.
21.78 on the LLMflation Index means frontier token prices have fallen 78% since GPT-4 launch.
$0.18/M output for open-source gpt-oss-120b undercuts every closed provider by at least 2x.
196.5% annualized volatility on H200 OCPI makes it the riskiest compute contract to hold unhedged.
